title: Scientific Advisory Committee on Digital Health Technologies (SAC-DHT) - Canada.ca
content:
## Scientific Advisory Committee on Digital Health Technologies (SAC-DHT)

## Meeting Announcement
Ottawa, Ontario March 29, 2019
The purpose  of this Notice is to announce an upcoming meeting of Health Canada’s Scientific  Advisory Committee on Digital Health Technologies (SAC-DHT).
The next meeting  will be held on May 9, 2019, and will examine artificial intelligence and its  impact on medical devices.

### Mandate of the SAC-DHT
Members will  advise Health Canada on matters relating to Digital Health Technologies, which  include but are not limited to the following:
- Artificial intelligence
- Software as a  Medical Device
- Wireless medical  devices
- Mobile medical  apps
- Medical device  data systems
- Medical device  interoperability
Stakeholders  and subject matter experts will make presentations to the committee. This will  be followed by a presentation from Health Canada summarizing background  information, to provide context for the questions posed. Upon completion of the  presentations and associated discussion, the committee will deliberate in a  closed meeting before providing their recommendations to Health Canada.
The detailed  agenda for the meeting will be posted at a later date.
